title: Bridge Essay: Tradition, Science and Practice of Om Dhyana (Meditation): A Comprehensive Review.
concept: Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

**Tradition, Science and Practice of Om Dhyana (Meditation): A Comprehensive Review.** - Adv Mind Body Med (2025). DOI: . PMID: 40265989. INTRODUCTION: Om is considered the primordial sound of the universe and is highly regarded in the Indian tradition. Dhyana (meditation) on the Om mantra, a yogic mento-spiritual practice, can be performed through various methods such as verbal/mental chanting, listening to it, and gazing or visualization. Several health-related benefits are reportedly associated with it. The study aimed to qualitatively analyze all the health-related benefits from the existing scientific literature. METHODS: A s
